answers: Text classification is an NLP task that assigns predefined categories or labels to text. Spam detection, sentiment analysis, and topic categorization are all forms of text classification.
Text classification holo text ke category e vag kora. Jemon email spam/not-spam, news article er topic detect kora, ba customer review positive/negative classify kora.
Text classification can be done using traditional ML (Naive Bayes, SVM), deep learning (CNN, LSTM), or transformer models (BERT, RoBERTa). Modern approaches achieve very high accuracy.
Text classification is one of the most practical NLP applications. It powers email filtering, content moderation, customer support routing, document organization, and intent detection in chatbots.
